World.headline: Trump-Xi Summit Annoys EU As Kallas Points To JD Vance's Speech; 'Worse When Elephants Make Love'

Her remarks highlight rising geopolitical tensions and fears of a shifting world order.

World.headline: Trump Confirms Iran War Return, Attack Anytime? US' Big Declaration; 'CALM BEFORE THE STORM...'

Plans include intensified strikes on Iranian military sites, special operations missions targeting underground nuclear facilities, and even the seizure of Kharg Island — a vital Iranian oil export hub. Iran has warned it is ready to deliver a “well-deserved response to any aggression,” as diplomatic negotiations remain deadlocked.

Health.summary: The Indian government has announced that there have been no new cases of Ebola in the country since 2014. This update reassures the public about the containment of the virus within India's borders.
key_points: India has not reported any fresh Ebola cases since 2014.
This confirms the effective containment of the virus in the country.
The government has provided this update.

Health.headline: Congo's Ebola Outbreak Claims 65 Lives, Declared Global Health Emergency
Health.summary: A severe Ebola outbreak in Congo has tragically led to 65 deaths, prompting the World Health Organization to declare it a global health emergency. Health authorities are intensifying efforts to track cases and implement crucial containment measures to prevent further spread and mitigate the humanitarian crisis.
key_points: Ebola outbreak in Congo has caused 65 deaths.
WHO declared the outbreak a global health emergency.
Intensified efforts are underway to track cases and contain the virus.
The situation highlights an urgent humanitarian crisis.

Health.headline: Are psychedelic-assisted therapies the future of mental health care?
Health.summary: The article explores the potential of psychedelic-assisted therapies as a future direction for mental health care, discussing their effectiveness in treating conditions like PTSD and depression. Research in this field suggests a paradigm shift in therapeutic approaches, though regulatory hurdles remain.
key_points: Psychedelic-assisted therapies are being explored for mental health care.
They show promise in treating conditions like PTSD and depression.
This represents a potential paradigm shift in therapeutic approaches.
Regulatory challenges are still present.

Health.headline: WHO warns of the addiction risks of nicotine pouches for young people
Health.summary: The World Health Organization (WHO) has issued a warning regarding the significant addiction risks of nicotine pouches, particularly for young people. This alert highlights growing concerns about the appeal and health implications of these products for a vulnerable demographic.
key_points: WHO warns about addiction risks of nicotine pouches for young people.
Highlights growing concerns about these products' appeal and health implications.
Targets a vulnerable demographic.

Health.headline: Are you sleeping too little or too much for healthy ageing?
Health.summary: The article examines the crucial role of sleep duration in healthy aging, questioning whether individuals are getting too little or too much rest. It highlights the importance of optimal sleep patterns for long-term well-being and cognitive function.
key_points: Examines the role of sleep duration in healthy aging.
Discusses whether too little or too much sleep impacts health.
Emphasizes optimal sleep patterns for long-term well-being.
